author: @NeroKoso

text:
Intro 
-What you doing, dad? 
-Who is it, who’s there? Oh, sorry. Sorry, son. 
-Yeah! I’m young and hip, you’re old. That’s not cool. 
-How dare you say that to me? After I purchased that shirt with this shirt at a bargain price, for you and your mother. Before fire ants ate her corpse! 
-What are you talking about? 
-This is... Look... 
 
Scene 1 
-Hard day at work! Yeah... Another day, another dollar! You know what I mean? I said. Another day. Another dollar! You don't know about that! Cuz you've never worked a day in your damn life! Have you boy?! A! You ain't never worked a damn day! You ain't never lifted one finger, for what I bring into this house! And what you bring into this house? Ever since I took you in! You’ve just been shitting your pants! (PUKE) I’m a joke! 
 
Scene 2 
-You think you're better than me? You think you can just come in here and play Sega Genesis anytime you want? You're wrong! This Dreamcast keyboard is outdated! You're outdated! This whole damn house is outdated! You're going down! It's time for... It's time for retribution! That's what the time for... 
 
Scene 3 
-You can't take what I have got... Away from me... I'm Number One! I'll always be Number One... You'll always just be... Number Two! 
-You ain't the best! You ain't the best now. You think you got what it takes? You don't have it! You don't have it! Cuz I ain't give it to you yet! You just don't have it! Ain't got it! Ain't gonna have it! Never will have it! Never did have it! Never gonna get it! Not gonna take it from me! I ain't gonna give it! (Chokes himself) 
 
Flashback 
(PUKE) I’m a joke!

Music from 1st Scene:
Deadly Premonition OST - FBI Special Agent
Deadly Premonition OST - Goddess
